message:
fix(mysql,h3): audit mysql.rs + h3_native.rs — 6 bugs fixed

mysql.rs (3 bugs):
- HIGH: auth switch nonce includes trailing null byte, causing auth
  to always fail after server-initiated plugin switch
- HIGH: cancellation mid-result-set does not mark connection closed,
  causing protocol desync on connection reuse
- MEDIUM: 0xFE-header OK terminator not recognized in DEPRECATE_EOF
  mode when info string makes packet >= 9 bytes

h3_native.rs (3 bugs):
- MEDIUM: frame payload length u64→usize truncation on 32-bit targets
- LOW: QPACK string length u64→usize truncation on 32-bit targets
- LOW: finished request streams never removed from connection state,
  causing unbounded memory growth on long-lived connections

Also audited SOUND (0 bugs):
- priority.rs (2993L), cap.rs (2826L), plan/analysis.rs (2752L)

150 tests pass (84 h3_native + 66 mysql)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
